search_queries: 2026 HDHP minimum deductible maximum out-of-pocket IRS Rev Proc 2025-19
contract_notes: Report 7 dollar amounts for calendar year 2026.
HSA contribution limits: self-only and family coverage amounts, plus the age-55+ catch-up ($1,000, statutory and not indexed).
HDHP thresholds: minimum annual deductible (self-only and family) and maximum annual out-of-pocket (self-only and family).
Source is IRS Rev. Proc. 2025-19 for the base limits. OBBBA expanded HSA-eligible coverage types but did not change these dollar amounts.
The catch-up contribution amount ($1,000) is set by IRC §223(b)(3)(B) and is not indexed for inflation.
